strategic_objective: Clarify the nature and impact of near-perfect linear correlations among key features to assess redundancy and implications for model robustness.
key_checks: Quantify linear dependency strength and identify feature pairs with correlations >= 0.9993
Distinguish dependencies arising from protocol/measurement constraints versus engineered feature overlap
Evaluate how these dependencies affect feature selection stability and model sensitivity
Check for potential masking or amplification of signal due to redundant features
success_criteria: Clear differentiation between inherent protocol relationships and redundant engineered features
Evidence of dependency impact on model robustness and feature selection decisions
Identification of features that can be safely pruned or require preservation for stability
router_constraints: preserve evidence refs e13 to e22
